properties.text: Within this very strong thunderstorm, there is radar indicated rotation. Meaning a tornado is possible. Please, seek shelter!
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
Im issuing a PDS severe thunderstorm warning. 
With an ongoing tornado warning, and 6cm+ hail was observed, i believe this is what suits this storm well.
Please, if you are in the path of this extremely strong thunderstorm, please seek shelter, due to the ongoing big hail and a tornado warning!
Strong wind gusts are also possible, maybe reaching even up to 100 km/h!
- Hail 6cm+
- Wind 100km/h+
- dBZ 64+
- Echo tops 16km+
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A couple of damagingly severe thunderstorms are moving east towards osnabruck, Germany, they can bring hail up to 4cm or more, wind gusts of 80km/h are expected, please take cover if these storms are coming for you!
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
A lot of strong thunderstorms are moving east into this region, a tornado watch is in effect due to these storms having embedded rotations, a tornado is possible!
MAX:
Tornado: 10%
Hail: 4-5cm
Winds: 100km/h
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A couple of strong thunderstorms are producing strong hail and extremely strong activity of lightning strikes, high winds are possible! Movement: East

properties.text: A very severe thunderstorm with a fairly strong rotation is close to Bielefield, Germany. On radar a strong rotation is visible.

properties.text: A very severe thunderstorm with a fairly strong rotation is close to Bielefield, it is moving ESE-SE, Strong hail up to 4cm or slightly more is possible, lightning activity is very strong!

properties.text:
A severe thunderstorm with a fairly strong rotation is close to Borgentreich, it is moving ESE-SE, Strong hail up to 3-4cm is possible, lightning activity is very strong!
Tornado Chance: 10%
Hail: 3-4cm
Winds: up to 80km/h or slightly more
lightning activity: strong

properties.text:
A couple of severe thunderstorms are close to Borgentreich, Germany, they are producing hail up to 3cm and a lot of lightning strikes! There is a small tornado chance.
Tornado Chance: 5-10%
Hail: 3cm
Winds: up to 80km/h or slightly more
lightning activity: strong
